top_articles.title: TrueConf Zero-Day Exploited in Asian Government Attacks
top_articles.summary: A Chinese threat actor exploited the video conferencing platform to perform reconnaissance, escalate privileges, and execute additional payloads.

top_articles.title: Critical ShareFile Flaws Lead to Unauthenticated RCE
top_articles.summary: The vulnerabilities can be chained together to bypass authentication and upload arbitrary files to the server.

top_articles.title: Critical Vulnerability in Claude Code Emerges Days After Source Leak
top_articles.summary: Within days of each other, Anthropic first leaked the source code to Claude Code, and then a critical vulnerability was found by Adversa AI.

top_articles.title: Cisco Patches Critical and High-Severity Vulnerabilities
top_articles.summary: The bugs could lead to authentication bypass, remote code execution, information disclosure, and privilege escalation.

top_articles.title: Over 14,000 F5 BIG-IP APM instances still exposed to RCE attacks
top_articles.summary: Internet security watchdog Shadowserver has found over 14,000 BIG-IP APM instances exposed online amid ongoing attacks exploiting a critical-severity remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability.

top_articles.title: New Windows 11 emergency update fixes preview update install issues
top_articles.summary: Microsoft released an emergency update to fix the March 2026 KB5079391 non-security preview update, which was pulled over the weekend due to installation issues.
